attempts.test_code:
import math
import threading
from source import sqrt


def test_sqrt_convergence_uses_residual_not_distance():
    result_box = [None]

    def target():
        result_box[0] = sqrt(2, 0.01)

    t = threading.Thread(target=target, daemon=True)
    t.start()
    t.join(timeout=1.0)

    assert not t.is_alive(), (
        "sqrt(2, 0.01) did not terminate within 1 second — "
        "the convergence check uses abs(x - approx) instead of abs(x - approx**2); "
        "abs(2 - sqrt(2)) ≈ 0.586 never falls below epsilon=0.01, causing an infinite loop"
    )
    assert abs(result_box[0] - math.sqrt(2)) <= 0.01, (
        f"sqrt(2, 0.01) returned {result_box[0]!r}, "
        f"expected a value within 0.01 of {math.sqrt(2):.6f}"
    )
